documentation: Cursor is an AI-first code editor built as a fork of VS Code. It deeply integrates LLMs to generate code, refactor entire files, and answer questions about the entire codebase using vector search.
pricing: Basic is Free. Pro tier is $20/month offering unlimited completions and premium model access (GPT-4, Claude 3.5 Sonnet).
release_notes: Cursor Tab update introduced multi-line predictive code generation and real-time error correction.
